docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY SCHELSKE,MARY AS TO DEFENDANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA CAMPBELL,DWAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FARAGUNA,NAUDIA CAMPBELL,DWAYNE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHELSKE,MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SCHELSKE,MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHELSKE,MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA $1.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $37.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA CAMPBELL,DWAYNE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SCHELSKE,MARY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHELSKE,MARY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22763, RECORD TRANSFERRED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHELSKE,MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SCHELSKE,MARY $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, REMANDED FROM SUP CT SCA 22763 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FARAGUNA,NAUDIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL,DWAYNE
